BIG_HAT.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random [gold]Ethereal[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BLOOD_SOAKED_ROSE.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
BLOOD_SOAKED_ROSE.eventDescription: Add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
CHOICES_PARADOX.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to the chosen card.
DISTINGUISHED_CAPE.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]Curses[/red] and [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Apparition|Apparitions}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
FUNERARY_MASK.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Soul|Souls}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
HEFTY_TABLET.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Rare cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], and add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
HEFTY_TABLET.eventDescription: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Rare cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
NEOWS_BONES.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] random [gold]Neow {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]{Curses:plural:Curse|Curses}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
NEOWS_BONES.eventDescription: Gain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] random [gold]Neow {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]{Curses:plural:Curse|Curses}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
NEOWS_SACRIFICE.description: Upon pickup, procure [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Ambergris[/gold] and add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Guilty[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
NEOWS_TORMENT.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
NINJA_SCROLL.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Shiv|Shivs}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ORANGE_DOUGH.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
POWER_CELL.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zero-cost cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
PRESERVED_FOG.description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
PRESERVED_FOG.eventDescription: Remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your Deck.
RADIANT_PEARL.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminesce|Luminesces}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SERE_TALON.description: Upon pickup, lose [blue]9[/blue] Max HP. Add [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SERE_TALON.eventDescription: Lose [red]9[/red] Max HP. Add [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
STORYBOOK.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
